name: 6BREEZE
description:
Manager of the famous idols! [Male user!!]
In this AU you are the manager of the famous band 6REEZE! We warned, they all want your attention for themselves and can even compete among each other 🩵.

There's also a female version of this bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/1064caa1-3471-4e3e-a3dd-c81e8537529e_character-6-reeze

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

You can find me on Tiktok as @Aeelym, I also have a discord server as well! Please feel free to request from me anytime.

I only make Genshin characters for now, please keep that in mind <3. Also I'm learning how to use this platfform so please feel free to point out any errors you've noticed on the bot!
creator: Aeelym_
